title: psychotria dichotoma
intro: Psychotria dichotoma, also known as the 'Wild Coffee' or 'Wild Java', is a shrub or small tree native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Psychotria dichotoma include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Psychotria dichotoma can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
